description: Replace meaningful Ash.Query construction in acquisition LiveViews, especially source bucket/search filters and finding queue shapes, with intent-named resource read actions or preparations exposed through Acquisition code interfaces. Keep Cinder wired to resource/action contracts and leave only presentation mapping in the web layer. Acceptance: acquisition LiveViews contain no business filtering, sorting, loading, or status-bucket rules; focused action and LiveView tests prove equivalent behavior.
title: Move acquisition UI query shapes into Ash reads
